shots.description: Ordered shot sequence for the renderer. Index 0 = first frame of video. Each entry is self-contained with resolved asset_id values. When present, the renderer uses this array directly instead of inferring shots from resolved_assets.

background_asset_id.description: Resolved from ShotList.Shot.background_id via the two-step lookup: ShotList.background_id → AssetManifest.shared.backgrounds[bg_id].asset_id → this field. Must match an asset_id present in resolved_assets[].

character_asset_ids.description: Ordered list of resolved asset_ids for characters appearing in this shot. Each value must match an asset_id present in resolved_assets[].

vo_lines.description: Ordered VO lines assigned to this shot with timeline offsets relative to shot start. Empty array if the shot has no VO. Plan builders must ensure every timeline_out_ms ≤ duration_ms before emitting; the renderer clips at duration_ms at runtime as a safety net.

sfx_asset_ids.description: Resolved asset_ids for SFX clips in this shot, in the same order as AssetManifest.shared.sfx_items[] for this shot. Each must match an asset_id present in resolved_assets[]. Empty array if the shot has no SFX or all SFX are pending.

music_asset_id.description: Resolved asset_id for the background music track in this shot. Null if no music or the item is pending. Must match an asset_id present in resolved_assets[] when not null.

background_segments.description: Multi-segment background sequence (v3). When present, the renderer concatenates these segments in order instead of using background_asset_id as a single looped source. Null or absent for single-background shots.

asset_id.description: Resolved background asset ID. Must match an entry in resolved_assets[].

uri.description: File URI for the background media (e.g. file:///path/to/image.jpg).

media_type.description: Whether this segment is a static image or a video clip.

duration_sec.description: Effective playback duration in seconds. For video segments with start_sec/end_sec, this is derived as (end_sec - start_sec). For images, null (use hold_sec instead).

hold_sec.description: Display duration for image segments. Null for video segments.

animation_type.description: Optional animation effect for image segments (e.g. zoom_in, pan_lr, ken_burns). Null for video segments.

start_sec.description: Clip trim start point in seconds from beginning of source video. Default 0 (or null/absent). Used with end_sec for sub-clip selection.

end_sec.description: Clip trim end point in seconds from beginning of source video. Null/absent means play to natural end. Must be > start_sec when set.

line_id.description: Matches AssetManifest.{locale}.vo_items[].item_id (and AssetManifest.{locale}.json resolved_assets[].asset_id for resolved VO assets)

timeline_in_ms.description: Start offset in ms relative to shot start (0 = shot begins). Phase 0: evenly distributed approximation across shot duration. Phase 1: derived from real TTS audio file duration.

timeline_out_ms.description: End offset in ms relative to shot start. Plan builder validation rule: must be ≤ duration_ms. Renderer clips to duration_ms at runtime if violated.
